diagrams.title: File Stream Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows inheritance relationship between iostream classes and file streams
diagrams.purpose: Understanding which classes to use for different file operations and their inheritance relationships.

diagrams.title: File Pointer Operations
diagrams.description: Visual representation of seekg, seekp, tellg, tellp and their functions
diagrams.purpose: Remembering which function controls which pointer and the reference points for positioning.

diagrams.title: File Opening Modes Overview
diagrams.description: Summary table of all file open modes and their effects
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for choosing correct file mode based on required operation.

diagrams.title: Text vs Binary Mode Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows difference in how data is stored and interpreted in text vs binary mode
elements: Text mode: interprets data as characters, newline translation occurs
Binary mode: raw byte storage, no translation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding when to use each mode and how data is handled differently.
